untranslatable_reason: Signal requires explicit Fibonacci retracement level calculation (100%, 50%, 61.8%, 38.2%, 33%, 25%, 12.5%). These levels must be derived from swing highs/lows, which requires multi-bar lookback logic and dynamic pivot computation not supported by the allowed indicator set. The closest approximation uses pivot points (pivot, s1, r1) as support/resistance proxies, but this does not accurately implement true Fibonacci retracements.
translation_notes: Attempted approximation using pivot-based support/resistance levels (s1, pivot, r1) as a proxy for Fibonacci retracement zones. However, this is NOT equivalent to true Fibonacci retracement levels which require identifying swing points and calculating specific percentage levels between them. A proper implementation would need a custom Fibonacci retracement indicator.
